{{Quote|I have another job for you. Retrieve a datapad from Arslynd. Take it from him, and make sure he isn't capable of telling anyone about it later.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BH" />}}
'''Arslynd''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Let me see that. The cargo was Dr... and that's it!? I'm missing critical information here! I ought to blast you right now!|Boba Fett, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BH" />}}
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Arslynd resided on board [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:BH" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> Arslynd was in possession of information needed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] about a certain shipment. In the meanwhile, Fett was training a spacer who wished to become a bounty hunter and realized that obtaining information from Arslynd could be a good exercise. Fett therefore tasked the spacer to interrogate Arslynd about the shipment. The spacer finally found Arslynd and his [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] in the atrium of the station. Indeed, Arslynd was not willing to share any information and attacked the spacer. The latter thus killed Arslynd and eventually collected his [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]]. Unfortunately, the datapad was damaged during the fight and Boba Fett was not able to obtain the information he was looking for.<ref name="SWG:BH" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateThug.png|thumb|250px|Possible depictions of Arslynd]]
Arslynd appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BH" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Arslynd was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:BH" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>

Arslynd was found in the tutorial level on Tansarii Point Station and was killed by any player who took the Bounty hunter profession as part of a non-optional class quest for Boba Fett. Arslynd's [[Species/Legends|species]] and [[Gender/Legends|gender]] would be randomized each time he spawned. Some potential appearances included being a male or female [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]], or a female [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]]. However, the quest dialogue established him as a male.<ref name="SWG:BH" />
